errors.network: Can't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.server: Our service is having a moment. Please try again shortly.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
